top_findings.summary: The skill requests direct SQLite database access to the sensitive `~/Library/Messages/chat.db` file containing the user's entire iMessage history, and includes a daemon that autonomously monitors messages, runs continuous background processes, and sends message content to third-party servers (Anthropic/Claude API). While the primary purpose is iMessage interaction, the daemon component enables extensive surveillance and autonomous agent execution far beyond simple message reading/sending, including persistent monitoring, conversation archiving, and accessing all Claude Code skills/tools. This represents significant overreach beyond basic iMessage functionality.
